quote: `Notifications.start_link(opts)` — starts the backing process. Accept a `:name` option for registration (default `Notifications`) and a `:buffer_size` option (max retained events per user, default `100`).
reason: The prompt explicitly requires start_link/1 to honor a `:name` option for registration, so starting a second server under `name: :notifications_5894` must succeed alongside any default-named instance; the `{:already_started, pid}` failure shows the solution registered under the default name regardless of the option, which the prompt directly forbids.
